{valid_until: STRING, link: STRING, sourceID: STRING}" Relationship point from source to target nodes "(:Entity)-[:registered_address]->(:Address),(:Entity)-[:same_as]->(:Entity),(:Entity)-[:same_company_as]->(:Entity),(:Entity)-[:similar_company_as]->(:Entity),(:Entity)-[:same_name_as]->(:Officer),(:Intermediary)-[:intermediary_of]->(:Entity),(:Intermediary)-[:similar]->(:Intermediary),(:Intermediary)-[:registered_address]->(:Address),(:Intermediary)-[:officer_of]->(:Entity),(:Intermediary)-[:underlying]->(:Officer),(:Intermediary)-[:same_intermediary_as]->(:Intermediary),(:Intermediary)-[:same_name_as]->(:Intermediary),(:Intermediary)-[:connected_to]->(:Entity),(:Intermediary)-[:same_as]->(:Officer),(:Officer)-[:officer_of]->(:Entity),(:Officer)-[:registered_address]->(:Address),(:Officer)-[:similar]->(:Officer),(:Officer)-[:intermediary_of]->(:Entity),(:Officer)-[:underlying]->(:Officer),(:Officer)-[:same_name_as]->(:Officer),(:Officer)-[:probably_same_officer_as]->(:Officer),(:Officer)-[:connected_to]->(:Entity),(:Officer)-[:same_id_as]->(:Officer),(:Address)-[:same_as]->(:Address),(:Other)-[:registered_address]->(:Address),(:Other)-[:connected_to]->(:Entity),(:Other)-[:same_name_as]->(:Entity),(:Other)-[:underlying]->(:Entity)"
ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Entity {name: 'GlobalCorp'})-[r1:registered_address]->(b:Address),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:officer_of]->(c:Officer {name: 'John Doe'}),
    p3 = (a)-[r3:intermediary_of]->(d:Intermediary {name: 'CorpSupport'}),
    p4 = (d)-[r4:connected_to]->(e:Entity {name: 'GlobalCorp'}),

    p5 = (b)-[r5:registered_address]->(f:Address {country: 'US'}),
    p6 = (c)-[r6:underlying]->(g:Officer {name: 'Jane Smith'}),
    p7 = (d)-[r7:same_as]->(h:Intermediary {name: 'CorpSupport'}),
    p8 = (g)-[r8:officer_of]->(i:Entity {name: 'GlobalCorp'})

WHERE a.name <> e.name AND b <> f AND c <> g
RETURN p1, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6, p7, p8
ground.question: How are the registered addresses of GlobalCorp’s subsidiaries in the US linked to its original corporate structure, particularly through the intermediary CorpSupport, and what role does Jane Smith play in verifying those connections?

cypher:
MATCH (e:Entity {name: 'GlobalCorp'})-[:registered_address]->(a:Address {countries: 'USA'})
MATCH (e)-[:intermediary_of]->(i:Intermediary {name: 'CorpSupport'})
MATCH (i)-[:intermediary_of]->(o:Entity)<-[:officer_of]-(s:Officer {name: 'Jane Smith'})
RETURN e, a, i, o, s
